name: SP Corporation Limited
summary: SP Corporation Limited engages in the commodities trading business. The company distributes tyres; and trades in and markets various products, including coal, rubber, and metals, as well as other commodities and products that are used by manufacturers in the energy, tyre, metal, and automotive industries. It also markets and distributes consumer products, such as feminine napkins, baby diapers, diaper pants, baby wet wipes, and adult diapers; and provides in-house packaging for supermarkets. SP Corporation Limited operates in Singapore, China, Hong Kong, Indonesia, and internationally. The company was incorporated in 1952 and is headquartered in Singapore. SP Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of Tuan Sing Holdings Limited.
